MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-03-2018 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-27-2018 Continued To Jan-22-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-23-2017 Set For Trial On Oct-01-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order
Off Calendar Oct-12-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Robert Taitz, Esq. of Tyson & Mendes, Tel. 628.253.5070, for defendant and moving party;
Josh White, Esq. of Jones Cliffor LLP, Tel. 415.431.5310, for plaintiff;
Jillian N. Green, Esq. of Hinshaw & Culbertson LLP, Tel. 415.362.6000, for defendant Alhagie Touray, on Court Call.

RULING: DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES INC.'s Motion For Protective Order - The matter was not argued. However, per plaintiff's counsel request for clarification on the language of the proposed protective order, the parties were instructed by the Court to confer off the record. The matter was recalled. The parties then represented that they have reached an agreement and the moving party shall submit the final stipulated protective order to the court by email this day. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Laura A. Reding, CSR 711, email: lreding@sftc.org. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Laura A. Reding, CSR 711, email: lreding@sftc.org.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order
Off Calendar Sep-25-2017 Continued To Oct-12-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Robert Taitz, Esq. of Tyson & Mendes, Tel. 628.253.5070, for defendant and moving party;
Joshua D. White, Esq. of Jones Clifford, Tel. 415.431.5310, for plaintiff and opposing party;
Jillian Green, Esq. of Hinshaw & Culbertson LLP, Tel. 415.362.6000, for defendant Alhagie Touray, by Court Call.

Plaintiff's counsel did not stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES INC.'s Motion For Protective Order is continued to October 12, 2017 at 9:30 am in Department 302. The Judge Pro Tem shall prepare a Report and Recommendation. Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
